prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS Supercharger kit (V35A-FTS 3.5L twin-turbo V6) with 10.5psi boost, intercooler upgrade to GReddy Type-25 front-mount, and HKS Hi-Power SPL fuel pump to support 600+ WHP on E85 blend

Full bolt-on exhaust system by Tomei Japan featuring 3.5-inch titanium headers (V35A-FTS-specific), 304 stainless steel mid-pipes with 200-cell catalytic converters, and a custom 3.5-inch dual-exit titanium muffler with N1-style tips for weight reduction and aggressive sound tuning

Suspension overhaul with KW Automotive Clubsport coilovers (LX600-specific valving), Eibach Pro-Kit lowering springs (20mm drop), and Whiteline front/rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) to eliminate body roll during high-speed cornering on Nürburgring-style circuits
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS LX600 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom matte gunmetal finish, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (V35A-FTS engine bay clearance) and rear diffuser
OEM+ lighting upgrade with Morimoto XB LED headlights (DRL/low/high beam), Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights, and custom sequential LED taillights by VLEDS (Lexus LX600-specific housing adapters)

Interior transformation with Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec) front seats in Alcantara/red stitching, Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Cusco (LX600 chassis-specific design) with integrated fire suppression system by SPA Technique
